---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Apico
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Environment
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 12, Windows 11, Ubuntu 20.04)
- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17)
- **Node.js version**: (if running locally)
- **Docker**: (yes/no, and version if applicable)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Error Messages
If you see any error messages in the browser console or terminal, please paste them here:

```
[Paste error messages here]
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] I am using the latest version
- [ ] I have provided all necessary information
